summary: Comprehensive testing of Celesta Glow e-commerce platform after optimization. All major features verified: notifications cycling correctly (welcome → order), referral system working, checkout flow functional, pricing correct (₹699), admin panel loading. Backend: 18/19 tests passed (95%). Frontend: All critical flows working.

minor.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed - endpoint may use POST instead of GET

features_tested: Welcome notification appears for new visitors after 5 seconds
Order notifications cycle after welcome notification
Close button (X) works on both notification types
Notifications dismissed correctly when X clicked
data-testid attributes present: welcome-notification, recent-purchase-notification, close-notification-btn
Homepage shows ₹699 price
Product page shows ₹699 with 53% OFF badge
Checkout shows price breakdown: MRP ₹1499, Festive Discount -₹800
Welcome offer -₹50 applied when discount claimed
Referral code from URL (?ref=CODE) stored in sessionStorage
Referral code persists across page navigation
₹50 referral discount shown in checkout
Order creation with referral_code works
Form fields: Name, Phone, Email, House/Flat, Area, Pincode, State
COD payment option (₹799 with 47% OFF)
Prepaid/Online payment option (₹699)
State auto-detection from pincode
Place Order button visible
WhatsApp button visible in bottom-right corner
No overlap with CTA buttons (Order Now, Buy Now)
Button clickable and links to wa.me
Login with password 'celestaglow2024' works
Dashboard shows: 21 Orders, ₹20,780 Revenue, 8 Leads, 45 Blogs
Live visitors count displayed (9)
Total visits displayed (896)
Navigation menu with all sections visible
Lazy loading working (admin pages load on demand)
COD order creation with 5-7 days delivery
Prepaid order creation with 2-3 days delivery
Order with referral code creation
Get all orders
Get order by ID

failed_tests: Validate referral code (405 - endpoint uses different HTTP method)

seed_data_creation: Created test orders with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features verified working after optimization. Notifications now cycle correctly (welcome → order). TrackingProvider centralized. PublicLayout with shared components working. Lazy loading for admin pages working. Referral system functional. Checkout flow complete with COD and Prepaid options.

notifications.welcome_notification: Appears for new visitors with X close button
notifications.order_notifications: Cycle after welcome notification with unique names/locations
